ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date_of_travel" TEXT /* Date when the trip took place */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company providing the cab service */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the trip occurred */,
  "km_travelled" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "price_charged" REAL /* Price charged for the trip */,
  "cost_of_trip" REAL /* Cost incurred for the trip */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* The specific location where the trip started */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* The specific location where the trip ended */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The time when the trip started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The time when the trip ended */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment used */,
  "surcharge" REAL /* Any additional charges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the cab company */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the cab company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the company based on customer feedback */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles the company operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the driver works for */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver based on customer feedback */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the driver has been working for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "frequent_rider" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a frequent rider */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip related to the feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer regarding the ride */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was given */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who provided the service */,
  "trip_satisfaction" TEXT /* Categorical value indicating the level of satisfaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_feedback_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES trips ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_feedback_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips recorded */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from all trips */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total costs incurred across all trips */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating from feedback across trips */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the summary period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the summary period */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance traveled across all trips */,
  "average_profit" REAL /* Average profit per trip */,
  "number_of_drivers" INTEGER /* Number of drivers involved in the trips */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of unique customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)
